architecture.summary: AC-gating in LifecycleHookDispatcher, SyncRetryQueue persisted to JSON, SyncCircuitBreaker per-provider singletons, RateLimitChecker integration into syncToGitHub

integrations.summary: GitHub/JIRA/ADO providers via existing LivingDocsSync, SyncCoordinator, ac-progress-sync infrastructure

ui-ux.summary: Dashboard OverviewPage sync error panel, SyncPage expandable errors, SSE real-time events, notifications.json integration

performance.summary: Rate limiting with 60s cache, exponential backoff 1m/5m/30m, circuit breaker 3 failures/5min reset, no high-traffic concerns since CLI tool

security.summary: N/A - internal CLI tooling, no auth or data exposure changes, existing credential handling unchanged

edge-cases.summary: Backward compat for tasks without AC tags still sync on every task, max 3 retries then manual review, circuit breaker prevents sync storms, fallback for missing providers
